meta.purpose: Structured copy manifest for ChatGPT to fill in replacement-ready site copy
instructions: Preserve the section order and heading hierarchy.
Use the provided datasets to fill in the copy exactly; do not invent facts.
Return null or NEEDS_RESEARCH for any missing or unverifiable detail.
Keep the copy artist-specific and concise, not generic marketing filler.
For repeated content, use the item templates and the accompanying data arrays.

navigation.display: sticky top navigation with brand, section anchors, and a CTA button

brand.display: logo/wordmark at the left of the nav

cta.display: pill button on desktop nav; hidden on mobile

heading.display: large hero headline on the left side of the split layout

subheading.text: Cry In Front Of You leads the hero while 2026 live dates stay front and center.
subheading.display: supporting paragraph directly under the H1

display.layout: two-column hero: text block left, album art / spotlight block right
display.media: feature image card on the right

elements.label: hero badge
elements.currentText: Cry In Front Of You · 2026 Live Dates
elements.display: small uppercase pill above the title

elements.label: hero title
elements.display: H1 in oversized display type
dataNeeded: final hero title wording if different from release title

elements.label: hero copy
elements.currentText: Cry In Front Of You leads the hero while 2026 live dates stay front and center.
elements.display: short paragraph below the title

elements.label: primary CTA
elements.display: primary button under the summary

elements.label: secondary CTA
elements.display: secondary button next to the primary CTA

elements.label: archive CTA
elements.display: tertiary text link
dataNeeded: archive route and label if changing

elements.label: archive heading

collections.display: current tour cards in a responsive grid

itemTemplate.displayText: month/day badge, venue title, city line, time, and ticket/status action

display.layout: paged carousel/grid of release cards with an anchored details sheet
display.emphasis: album/project archive with tracklist and video context

elements.label: release count

elements.label: carousel controls

elements.label: sheet title

elements.label: context label
elements.display: small uppercase label above the project summary paragraph

elements.label: streaming label

elements.label: featured artists label
elements.display: small uppercase label before featured artist names

elements.label: tracklist label
elements.display: small uppercase label before the ordered song list

elements.label: music video label
elements.display: small uppercase label above a track video embed

card.displayText: cover image/video fallback, release title, year/type, and optional badges

sheet.displayText: project summary, credits, tracklist, streaming stats, and optional video embed

trackRow.displayText: track number, track title, duration, credit summaries, and an optional video action
